details.criterion: Champion beats every baseline on fitness
Beyond SOTA: champion STATISTICALLY beats the previous champion

data.rawMarkdown:
# DARWIN-SHIELD-BENCH results

Corpus: `darwin-shield-bench@1.0.0` — 10 ground-truth vulns, 9 decoys. 3 evolution cycles.

**Overall: ❌ FAIL**

## Baselines vs champion

| Harness | fitness | TPR | FPR | patch-pass | repro | unsafe | cost |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| B0 static-only | 0.5665 | 0.3 | 1 | 1 | 1 | 0 | 4t/1r |
| B1 LLM single-pass | 0.1365 | 0 | 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 1t/1r |
| B2 fixed agent | 0.598 | 0.4 | 0.888889 | 1 | 1 | 0 | 2t/1r |
| B3 Darwin champion | 0.598 | 0.4 | 0.888889 | 1 | 1 | 0 | 2t/1r |

## Acceptance gates

- ❌ **TPR improvement ≥ 25% vs fixed harness** — +0% (B2 0.4 → B3 0.4)
- ❌ **FPR reduction ≥ 40%** — −0% (B2 0.888889 → B3 0.888889)
- ✅ **Patch-test pass rate ≥ 80%** — 100%
- ✅ **Reproduction success ≥ 90%** — 100%
- ✅ **Unsafe outputs = 0** — champion=0, baselines=0,0,0
- ✅ **Cost increase ≤ 2× fixed harness** — 1×
- ✅ **All runs reproducible from receipts** — B0=593274e6 B1=2589863b B2=92a56965 B3=6132a64b
- ❌ **Champion beats every baseline on fitness** — B3 0.598 vs [0.5665, 0.1365, 0.598]
- ❌ **Beyond SOTA: champion STATISTICALLY beats the previous champion** — lower95 0 > 0, meanDelta 0, p=1, unsafe-regression=false
- ✅ **Compounding: false-positive repeat-rate drop ≥ 35%** — −100% (cold 4 → warm 0)
- ✅ **Compounding: patch-reuse improvement ≥ 20%** — +100%
- ✅ **Compounding: seeded genomes beat random ≥ 15%** — +31.9125% (seeded 0.693406 vs random 0.525656)

## Statistical promotion (champion vs previous champion)

- mean per-repo Δ: **0** (prev 0.5155 → new 0.5155)
- lower-95% bound: **0** (> 0 required), one-sided p = 1
- verdict: ❌ not certified — not statistically superior (lower95 0 ≤ 0)

## Compounding (ruVector memory makes the next run smarter)

- false-positive repeat-rate drop: **100%** (≥ 35% required) ✅
- patch-reuse improvement: **100%** (≥ 20% required) ✅
- seeded-vs-random advantage: **31.9125%** (≥ 15% required) ✅

## Lever ablation (the harness is the lever)

Fitness lost when each lever is knocked out of the champion (full = 0.598):

- tools (→ single tool): **−0.0555**
- model (→ none): **−0.055**
- context (→ minimal): **−0.0275**
- reviewers (→ 1): **−0**
- memory (→ off): **−0**

## Champion genome

```json
{
  "id": "baseline",
  "planner": "file-first",
  "contextPolicy": "semantic",
  "reviewerCount": 1,
  "retryBudget": 2,
  "fuzzBudgetSeconds": 60,
  "tools": [
    "semgrep",
    "osv-scanner"
  ],
  "modelMix": [
    "claude"
  ],
  "validationPipeline": [
    "static",
    "fuzz",
    "repro-test",
    "review"
  ],
  "safetyProfile": "strict-defensive"
}
```

Lineage: baseline

Overall: FAIL
